# HPD.ML.TimeSeries.SeasonalityDetector

- Package: `HPD-ML-TimeSeries` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`

FFT-based seasonality period detection. Returns the dominant period or -1 if no significant periodicity found.
